programs.title: People Magazine Investigates
programs.desc: Crime journalists who are extremely experienced in their field reveal shocking plot twists and surprising solutions to crime cases known from the media.

programs.title: American Detective with Lt. Joe Kenda
programs.desc: Homicide Lieutenant Joe Kenda returns to cases that seem more like a movie script than a real investigation.He reconstructs the course of the crime, revealing the motives of the perpetrators.

programs.title: Dog Detectives
programs.desc: Investigation Discovery provides true crime documentaries, real-life investigations, and mystery-focused programming.

programs.title: Evil Lives Here
programs.desc: Stories of people who realize that they have been dealing with a murderer for years.Suddenly they are faced with a choice between loyalty and justice.They must decide which side to choose.

programs.title: Fatal Affairs
programs.desc: Stories related to love triangles will be presented.Each of them at some point turned into a crime mystery when one of the people died.
